steps: File Form 5001 with French tax authorities to reclaim EUR 3,744.00 excess withholding tax on TTE dividends
Submit evidence of Norwegian tax residency and FR-NO treaty eligibility to support 15% rate claim
Contact BNP Paribas Securities to request correction of withholding rate applied to account 901234567
Monitor French tax authority processing timeline for the EUR 3,744.00 refund claim

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
